name: source_url
description: The URL that was attempted. Required on every attempt regardless of outcome (since failed attempts may not have extracted a video_id).

name: attempted_at
description: Timestamp when this attempt was recorded. Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT. Orders attempts; use MAX(attempted_at) for the most recent attempt of a given source_url.

name: status
description: Outcome of this attempt: 'complete' | 'failed'. No in-flight states; every row represents a terminated attempt. NOT enforced as an enum by BigQuery — validation lives in application code.

name: video_id
description: YouTube video ID, populated on successful attempts. NULL on failures (yt-dlp may not have gotten this far). Foreign key to videos.video_id when populated.

name: status_message
description: Free-form error or status detail. Typically populated on failure to capture the error reason. NULL on success.

name: duration_ms
description: How long the attempt took, in milliseconds, from start of the worker's processing to terminal outcome. Useful for observability — slow successes and fast failures are different signals.
